security_gap.gap_description: A large redemption volume might cause unavailability.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Large redemptions could cause network congestion.

assumptions: There is a lack of rate limiting or circuit breakers on $BGT to $BERA redemptions.
Large $BGT redemptions are not handled efficiently, leading to network congestion.

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting or circuit breakers to prevent large $BGT to $BERA redemptions from overwhelming the network.

description: A user may perform a large $BGT to $BERA redemption, causing a denial of service to other users.
